methods.description: This method describes the process of crystallizing the enzyme, collecting diffraction data, and determining the structure through molecular replacement and refinement.

steps.description: Before crystallization, the activated enzyme was concentrated to 20 mg ml Ϫ1 using Vivaspin 6 (Vivascience) and incubated with 0.001 M CABP.
steps.searchable_summary: Concentrate enzyme and incubate with CABP

steps.description: Crystals were grown using the hanging-drop vapor diffusion method at 20°C.
steps.searchable_summary: Grow crystals using hanging-drop vapor diffusion

steps.description: Diffraction data were collected at Max-lab (Lund, Sweden) and at the European Synchrotron Radiation Source (Grenoble, France).
steps.searchable_summary: Collect diffraction data from synchrotron sources

steps.description: The data were processed using DENZO/SCALE-PACK and XDS.
steps.searchable_summary: Process diffraction data using DENZO/SCALE-PACK and XDS

steps.description: The crystal structures were solved by molecular replacement using the program MOLREP.
steps.searchable_summary: Solve crystal structures using molecular replacement

steps.description: Refinement was performed using REFMAC5 and PHENIX.
steps.searchable_summary: Refine crystal structures using REFMAC5 and PHENIX

methods.description: This method involves small-scale cultivation experiments to assess growth rates of diatom species under controlled conditions, using various metrics to determine the fastest growers.

steps.description: Small-scale cultivation experiments were performed in irradiance and temperature-controlled/logged rooms at two irradiances and temperatures.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct cultivation experiments under controlled conditions

steps.description: Several methods were applied to detect the fastest growers: increase in cell numbers, organic bound carbon and nitrogen, and in vitro Chla and pheophytin content.
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze growth using cell count, carbon/nitrogen content, and Chla/pheophytin content

steps.description: Computed growth as doublings/day using the formula: (Log 2 C2 - log 2 C1)/D.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate growth rate as doublings per day

steps.description: 14C radioactive tracer photosynthesis measurements were performed.
Calculated both the ␣-slope photosynthesis curve and P max - maximum photosynthesis.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate photosynthesis curve and maximum photosynthesis

steps.description: Standardized results for each species, condition, and experiment.
